pages.text: Spent nuclear fuel contains unburned Uranium, Plutonium, and dangerous Fission Products. $(br2)The PUREX process isolates these components using solvent extraction. $(br2)1. Dissolve spent rods in Nitric Acid to create a nitrate solution.$(br)2. Mix with TBP in Kerosene to separate Uranium and Plutonium from the waste.
The Solvent Extractor uses multi-stage centrifugal contactors to isolate isotopes with high purity.
Nitric Acid is used to dissolve spent fuel.
TBP is the organic solvent that extracts Uranium and Plutonium.
